channel.title: GitHub Ruby Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Ruby in GitHub

item.title: dependabot/dependabot-core
item.description: 🤖 Dependabot's core logic for creating update PRs.

item.title: forem/forem
item.description: For empowering community 🌱

item.title: fastlane/fastlane
item.description: 🚀 The easiest way to automate building and releasing your iOS and Android apps

item.title: rails/rails
item.description: Ruby on Rails

item.title: ruby/ruby
item.description: The Ruby Programming Language

item.title: department-of-veterans-affairs/vets-api
item.description: API powering VA.gov

item.title: jekyll/jekyll
item.description: 🌐 Jekyll is a blog-aware static site generator in Ruby

item.title: faker-ruby/faker
item.description: A library for generating fake data such as names, addresses, and phone numbers.

item.title: rmosolgo/graphql-ruby
item.description: Ruby implementation of GraphQL

item.title: doorkeeper-gem/doorkeeper
item.description: Doorkeeper is an OAuth 2 provider for Ruby on Rails / Grape.

item.title: hashicorp/vagrant
item.description: Vagrant is a tool for building and distributing development environments.

item.title: opf/openproject
item.description: OpenProject is the leading open source project management software.

item.title: paper-trail-gem/paper_trail
item.description: Track changes to your rails models

item.title: alexrudall/ruby-openai
item.description: OpenAI API + Ruby! 🤖❤️

item.title: discourse/discourse
item.description: A platform for community discussion. Free, open, simple.

item.title: rapid7/metasploit-framework
item.description: Metasploit Framework

item.title: redmine/redmine
item.description: Mirror of redmine code source - Official Subversion repository is at https://svn.redmine.org/redmine - contact: @vividtone or maeda (at) farend (dot) jp

item.title: markdownlint/markdownlint
item.description: Markdown lint tool

item.title: puma/puma
item.description: A Ruby/Rack web server built for parallelism

item.title: stripe/stripe-ruby
item.description: Ruby library for the Stripe API.

item.title: ctran/annotate_models
item.description: Annotate Rails classes with schema and routes info

item.title: CocoaPods/CocoaPods
item.description: The Cocoa Dependency Manager.

item.title: gitlabhq/gitlabhq
item.description: GitLab CE Mirror | Please open new issues in our issue tracker on GitLab.com

item.title: prawnpdf/prawn
item.description: Fast, Nimble PDF Writer for Ruby
